/usr/bin/ar qc libgba.a CMakeFiles/gba.dir/apu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/arm7.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/arm_instr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/dma.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/gamepad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/lcd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/mmu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/opengl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/swi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/thumb_instr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/gpio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/debug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/cheats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/sio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/gbma.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/jukebox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/am3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gba.dir/play_yan.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libgba.a
